info.title: In Atelier Control Plane API
info.summary: Control-plane contract baseline with contextual authorization and canonical core-domain entity contracts.
info.description: Public control-plane baseline contract used to validate versioning, contextual authorization, and canonical core-domain entity read/write expectations before later runtime implementation tasks.

get.summary: Fetch one canonical platform user entity

400.description: The request is malformed or contextually inconsistent.

403.description: The caller is authenticated but not authorized for this scope.

404.description: The requested entity was not found.

post.summary: Submit a canonical platform user write request

400.description: The request is malformed or contextually inconsistent.

403.description: The caller is authenticated but not authorized for this scope.

409.description: The request conflicts with current entity integrity or lifecycle state.

post.summary: Resolve a contextual authorization decision for one tenant/workspace-scoped action

parameters.name: tenantId
parameters.description: Tenant targeted by the decision request.

parameters.name: workspaceId
parameters.description: Workspace targeted by the decision request.

parameters.name: X-API-Version
parameters.description: Pinned contract generation date for non-breaking evolution inside v1.

parameters.name: X-Correlation-Id
parameters.description: Stable request correlation identifier reused by downstream authorization, orchestration, and audit flows.

400.description: The decision request is malformed or contextually inconsistent.

403.description: The caller is authenticated but not authorized for the requested tenant/workspace action.

404.description: The tenant, workspace, or target resource was not found.

bearerAuth.description: Keycloak-issued access token carrying platform, tenant, and workspace authorization bindings.

XApiVersion.name: X-API-Version
XApiVersion.description: Pinned contract generation date for non-breaking evolution inside v1.

XCorrelationId.name: X-Correlation-Id
XCorrelationId.description: Stable request correlation identifier reused by downstream authorization, orchestration, and audit flows.

action.description: Canonical action identifier such as workspace.update or bucket.write.

EntityMetadata.description: Non-secret additive metadata for canonical entities.
